task_completion.description: Verify that both MPAndroidChart and Retrofit dependencies are present in app/build.gradle.kts.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an open editor window showing 'app/build.gradle.kts' or terminal output (like cat or git diff) that clearly displays both 'com.github.PhilJay:MPAndroidChart' and 'com.squareup.retrofit2:retrofit' in the dependencies block.

task_completion.description: Verify that both the LineChart view and the LinearLayout login form are present in activity_main.xml.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an open editor window showing 'activity_main.xml' or terminal output displaying both '<com.github.mikephil.charting.charts.LineChart' and an element with 'android:id="@+id/login_container"'.

task_completion.description: Verify that all Git conflict markers have been removed from the modified files.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Examine the visible code for 'app/build.gradle.kts' and 'activity_main.xml'. There should be no '<<<<<<<', '=======', or '>>>>>>>' strings present in the files.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Android project builds successfully after resolving the conflicts.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Android Studio 'Build' tool window showing a green checkmark with 'Build: completed successfully', or a terminal window showing the output of a successful Gradle build (e.g., 'BUILD SUCCESSFUL in ...').

task_completion.description: Verify that the merge resolution has been committed to Git.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a terminal window showing a successful 'git commit' command output (e.g., '[main <hash>] Merge branch...'), or a 'git status' output showing 'nothing to commit, working tree clean', or the Android Studio Git tool window showing no uncommitted merge changes.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a real editor or standard command line tools to resolve the conflicts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the use of Android Studio, VS Code, Vim, Nano, or standard Unix text manipulation commands (sed, awk). The agent should not just echo a pre-computed perfect file without reading it first.

integrity.description: Verify the build success is from an actual Gradle execution.
integrity.visual_evidence: The build success message should be in the context of the Android Studio Build panel or a real terminal executing './gradlew build' or similar, not a mocked text file or simple echo command.

integrity.description: Verify the git commit was actually executed.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for standard git command line prompts and outputs, or the IDE's built-in version control GUI being actively used to create the commit.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The project is located at /home/ga/AndroidStudioProjects/TaskMaster. To successfully resolve the conflicts, 'app/build.gradle.kts' MUST contain 'com.github.PhilJay:MPAndroidChart' and 'com.squareup.retrofit2:retrofit'. The file 'app/src/main/res/layout/activity_main.xml' MUST contain 'com.github.mikephil.charting.charts.LineChart' and '@+id/login_container'. Standard git conflict markers ('<<<<<<<', '=======', '>>>>>>>') MUST NOT be present in the final versions of these files.
